# Gaia Agents (Canonical)

This folder is the canonical source for project agents.

Shared bootstrap: `.gaia/instructions/assistant-bootstrap.md`

Shared MCPs: `gaia-local`, `gaia-remote`, `gaia-workflows`, `playwright`

## Use these agent definitions

- `gaia-workload-orchestrator.md`
- `gaia-repo-explorer.md`
- `gaia-architect.md`
- `gaia-developer.md`
- `gaia-deployment-engineer.md`
- `gaia-mobile-native-developer.md`
- `gaia-mobile-release-engineer.md`
- `gaia-firearms-ballistics-specialist.md`
- `gaia-ui-design-architect.md`
- `gaia-ui-visual-developer.md`
- `gaia-tester.md`
- `gaia-quality-gatekeeper.md`
- `gaia-analyst.md`

## Notes

- Keep each agent file concise and aligned with `AGENTS.md`.
- If conventions/gates change, update affected agent docs in the same change set.
- Any `.github/*` agent references are compatibility pointers only.
